name: 4G Activation
description: Experimental/internal 0x51 command-ID sweep: 128 fire-and-forget frames with the aircraft serial embedded in each payload. Write completion does not prove 4G activation.
note: Each payload is 3 zero bytes + ASCII aircraft serial; frame i uses cmd_id=i (0..127). The serial is read at runtime via probeSerial(). There is no ACK/readback, and per-ID meanings are not decoded.
